channel.title: multilingual learning on Rudra Murthy
channel.description: Recent content in multilingual learning on Rudra Murthy

item.title: Improving NER Tagging Performance in Low-Resource Languages via Multilingual Learning
item.description: The Marathi Named Entity annotated data described in the paper can be downloaded here.

item.title: Judicious Selection of Training Data in Assisting Language for Multilingual Neural NER
item.description: The Marathi named entity annotated data described in the paper can be downloaded here.

item.title: Sharing Network Parameters for Crosslingual Named Entity Recognition
